title: Gradient XP Bar: Cool Tones
description: Makes your XP bar a cool-toned color gradient of purple, blue, aqua, & lime green.
body:
Turn your plain default green experience bar into a cool-toned gradient. 

Gradient colors start at purple, going through blue, aqua, and lime green at the XP level number in the center before reversing the gradient back to purple by the filled end. 
Lime green center matches the default xp level text color.
